goal: PlantDetail shows real info + care history; HomePage tasks are computed from plant data.
summary: Plant Detail & HomePage Tasks phase complete. PlantDetailPage now reads :id from useParams and fetches real plant data via usePlant(id). Added a care-logging form with Select dropdown for care types (water/fertilize/prune/repot/note), Textarea for notes, optional image upload, and submits via useAddCareLog. Added Care History section above the form that displays care logs via useCareLogs(id) with thumbnails, dates, and notes. HomePage now computes care tasks from real plants using next_water_at, showing "Water today" for urgent plants and "Water in X days" for others, with loading and empty states. TypeScript compiles with 0 errors.
stepSummaries:
1. Wire PlantDetailPage to read :id from useParams and fetch via usePlant(id) [verified]
  2. Add care-logging UI in PlantDetailPage (form to select care_type, add notes, and optionally attach image) [verified]
  3. Display care history on PlantDetailPage using useCareLogs(plantId) [verified]
  4. Replace HomePage hardcoded careItems with computed tasks from usePlants, showing plants whose next_water_at is today or overdue [verified]
  5. Final type-check verification [verified]

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 1 verified useParams/usePlant via grep (4 matches). Step 2 verified useAddCareLog/care_type via grep (3 matches). Step 3 verified useCareLogs via grep (2 matches). Step 4 verified usePlants in HomePage via grep (2 matches). Step 5 verified tsc 0 errors. All verifications concrete.
gateVerdicts.evidence: grep counts: useParams/usePlant(4), useAddCareLog(3), useCareLogs(2), usePlants in HomePage(2). tsc: 0 errors.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal met: PlantDetailPage shows real info and care history. HomePage tasks are computed from plant data. All query hooks from Phase 1 are consumed. The combined output ties together the full plant management flow: add plant → view list → view detail → log care → see tasks on home.
gateVerdicts.evidence: PlantDetailPage.tsx shows real data + care logs + care form. HomePage.tsx shows computed tasks from usePlants.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. Calendar and Journal tabs in MyPlantsPage remain static mock data — full care log integration for those tabs would require additional design decisions and is beyond Sprint 2 scope.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Calendar and journal tabs are noted as out-of-scope for Sprint 2 in prior phase gates.
